programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: CampTO Explore
programs.description: CampTO Explore is a fun and creative all-day experience. Enjoy games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. Water play or swim days will also be enjoyed, dependent on weather and camp location. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.

programs.description: CampTO Explore is a fun and creative full-day experience. Participants will enjoy games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. Water play or Swim days will also be enjoyed, dependent on weather and camp location. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement. These camp programs include a variety of age groups between 6 to 12 years old.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. programs.name: Extended Hours: PM
programs.description: This option provides supervised care after the end of the camp day for children registered in City of Toronto Parks, Forestry and Recreation camp.Extended hours activities have a separate barcode for registration. Please note that campers must be registered at the same location for extended hours as the activity they have registered in. Refer to the camp program charts for times, fees and locations.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Osteo Fit
programs.description: Help build and maintain stronger bones by increasing muscle strength with Osteo Fit. Suitable for individuals with low bone density or osteoporosis, exercises consist of slow-paced, weight-bearing movements with resistance.

programs.name: Outdoor Walk Fit
programs.description: Seeking a class with a more relaxed pace to improve your fitness? Using gentle movements and low-intensity level exercises, workouts will include both  cardio and muscle conditioning options.

programs.name: Outdoor Yoga With Caregiver
programs.description:
Relax
  your body and mind with yoga. Learn and practice yoga poses and postures to
  improve your balance, breathing, flexibility and strength. A caregiver must
  actively participate in this activity.

programs.name: Philpott Tennis
programs.description: This instructional tennis program is available for free, thanks to the generous support of Philpott Tennis and its donors. The program is run by qualified instructors hired and supervised by Philpott Tennis and all equipment is provided.

programs.name: Philpott Tennis
programs.description: This instructional tennis program is available for free, thanks to the generous support of Philpott Tennis and its donors. The program is run by qualified instructors hired and supervised by Philpott Tennis and all equipment is provided.

programs.description: This instructional tennis program is available for free, thanks to the generous support of Philpott Tennis and its donors. The program is run by qualified instructors hired and supervised by Philpott Tennis and all equipment is provided.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Pilates
programs.description: Build core strength and improve flexibility with this head-to-toe workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Pilates: Chair
programs.description: Gain all the benefits of pilates with the added support of a chair or your walker. Build core strength and improve flexibility with this  workout. As you progress through slow-paced movements, performed in sequence, you will learn to incorporate an awareness of the spine and breath in this complete approach to well being.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 1: Penguin
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Learn how to enter and exit the pool, go underwater, breathe effectively and float with assistance.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 3: Otter

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 4: Dolphin
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop front and back swim and sidekick. Learn how to jump into deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Preschool Swim 3.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2 - Small Group
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Class size is limited to four participants.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 5
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front dive, forward roll and front crawl. Learn back crawl, eggbeater kick and elementary backstroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 75 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training.  Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 6
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl, back crawl, elementary backstroke and eggbeater kick. Learn stride entries, surface dives, breaststroke and interval training. Work towards a continuous swim of 150 metres. This activity is for all girls.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 5.

programs.name: Adapted CampTO Explore
programs.description: Adapted CampTO Explore is a fun and creative camp experience for campers with a special need or a disability. Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

Enjoy modified active and quiet games, arts and crafts, sports and more while making new friends. A workshop, a local trip or a visit from a special guest will add to the excitement.Participants must have a current AIS membership. For membership information contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.
